title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, discusses building AI-native products with Fable and perspectives on Anthropic's safety approach. The interview covers how AI tooling is changing development workflows and Anthropic's competitive positioning as both platform and product.
writeup: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, talks with Alex Kantrowitz about building AI-native products, using Fable as a case study, and about Anthropic's safety approach. The conversation addresses how AI tooling is reshaping development workflows and Anthropic's competitive position as both a platform and a product maker. The discussion touches on AI agents, enterprise AI, and test-time compute.
